steps.title: Substitute x equals 8 into the first equation
steps.content: We already know $x = 8$ from the second equation. Substitute into $4x - 3y = 5$: $$4(8) - 3y = 5$$ $$32 - 3y = 5$$

steps.title: Solve for y
steps.content: Isolate $y$ by subtracting 32 from both sides and dividing by $-3$: $$-3y = 5 - 32$$ $$-3y = -27$$ $$y = 9$$ The solution to the system is $(8, 9)$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
